title: SYNTHETIC overlapping-window FAR - A (effective up to 2024-06-01)
description: SYNTHETIC fixture (M4-T004 FH-2): window (-inf, 2024-06-01). Overlaps syn-win-b on [2024-01-01, 2024-06-01), so an as_of_date inside that overlap has BOTH in effect and applicable to SYNTH for the same output -> a genuine conflict. Outside the overlap only one is in effect -> no conflict. Illustrative value; not a Verified determination.
